resources.string: Configure and export your wellness data
Install Health Connect from the Play Store to read your health data.
Open Health Connect and complete the initial setup, then come back to grant permissions.
Grant Health Connect permissions to export your health data.
Health Connect limits reads to about 30 days before this app first got permission. Grant history access so older selected dates are exported instead of silently omitted.
The export stopped before every day could be processed.
No per-day details were recorded. Try a smaller range and check Health Connect permissions.
Health Connect limited the number of reads. Wait a while, retry a smaller date range, or export the remaining dates later.
Open Health Connect and grant historical data access, then retry the failed range.
Reselect your export folder so Health.md can write files there, then retry.
Days without readable Health Connect data are skipped. If these dates should contain data, grant history access and retry the failed range.
Grant Health Connect background access for scheduled exports, then retry.
Unlock your phone once after reboot, then retry.
Select an export folder and retry.
Check Health Connect permissions and retry a smaller date range.
Retry with a smaller range. If it keeps failing, send feedback with this export history.
No health data found for this date range
Failed to write file \u2014 check folder access
Access denied to the export folder
Phone not unlocked since last reboot — please unlock and retry
Scheduled exports need Health Connect background access
Health Connect is rate limiting exports — wait a bit, then retry the remaining dates
Metrics, daily notes, individual tracking, format customization
No app available to open this link
Export timestamped samples (heart rate, sleep stages, etc.) for graph reconstruction
Inject health metrics into the YAML frontmatter of your existing Obsidian daily notes.
Inject health data into daily notes
Relative to your export folder (e.g., \"Daily\" or \"Journal/Daily\")
Also merge app-managed Markdown sections like Sleep, Activity, Heart, and Vitals while preserving your note text.
Create daily note if it doesn\'t exist
Write your own Markdown layout. Health.md replaces placeholders and removes conditional sections when that category has no data.
Export individual timestamped health entries as separate files. Useful for workouts, blood pressure readings, and other discrete measurements.
Scheduled exports write to your selected Android export folder. Manual exports stay available from the Export tab.
Note: Android controls exact background timing. Keep Health Connect background access enabled and exclude Health.md from battery optimization for reliable scheduled exports.
Each run exports the past 1 day ending with yesterday.
Each run exports the past %1$d days ending with yesterday.
Scheduled exports are still running, but you won’t get notified when they complete until notifications are enabled.
Scheduled exports need Health Connect’s “Access data in background” permission so WorkManager can read yesterday’s data while the app is closed.
Exports run in the background using WorkManager. For reliable scheduling, allow Health Connect background access and exclude Health.md from battery optimization.

Health.md found %1$d pending scheduled date(s): %2$s. If a scheduled export missed because the phone was locked after reboot, background access was missing, or Health Connect was unavailable, Health.md can retry those exact dates now while the app is open and unlocked. Grant background access to prevent future misses.
Unlock Health.md before recovering scheduled exports.
Select an export folder before recovering scheduled exports.
Unlock your phone once after reboot, then open Health.md again to recover these dates.
Grant Health Connect permissions before recovering scheduled exports.
A scheduled recovery export is already running.
No scheduled export dates are pending recovery.
Recovery exported %1$d/%2$d date(s). %3$d date(s) remain pending.
Scheduled recovery is not ready yet.
You can tune export formats, custom Markdown, and metrics from Settings.
GitHub bug reports now open the Android issue tracker with pre-filled app and device diagnostics.
Multi-format exports, previews, daily-note injection, and individual entries are now aligned with the iOS workflow.
Custom Markdown templates now include an editor, placeholder help, reset, and live preview.
Workout exports include richer Health Connect details, route status, splits, metadata, and granular samples when available.
TalkBack labels and touch targets were improved across export, schedule, and settings flows.
Notifications when scheduled health exports complete or fail
Scheduled exports need Health Connect background access. Open Health.md > Schedule to enable it.

Health.md is a health data export app. Every permission below maps directly to data that is read from Health Connect and written to a Markdown, CSV, JSON, or Obsidian Bases file stored locally on your device. History access is used only for large manual exports. Background access is used only when you enable scheduled exports. No health data is ever transmitted to any server.
Exported fields: total sleep hours, deep sleep, REM sleep, light sleep, awake time, time in bed
Steps, StepsCadence, ActiveCaloriesBurned, TotalCaloriesBurned, Distance, ElevationGained, FloorsClimbed, WheelchairPushes, ExerciseSession, BasalMetabolicRate

Exported fields: step count, steps cadence, active calories, total calories, basal calories, exercise minutes, floors climbed, walking/running distance, cycling/swimming/wheelchair/snow-sports distance, elevation gained, wheelchair pushes, swimming strokes
Exported fields: resting heart rate, average/min/max heart rate, walking heart rate average, heart rate variability (HRV)
RespiratoryRate, OxygenSaturation, BodyTemperature, BloodPressure, BloodGlucose, BasalBodyTemperature, SkinTemperature
Exported fields: respiratory rate, blood oxygen, body temperature, blood pressure (systolic/diastolic), blood glucose, basal body temperature, skin temperature
Weight, Height, BodyFat, LeanBodyMass, BodyWaterMass, BoneMass
Exported fields: weight, height, BMI, body fat %, lean body mass, body water mass, bone mass
Exported fields: dietary calories, macronutrients, fat subtypes, fiber, sugar, sodium, cholesterol, water, caffeine, vitamins, and minerals
Exported fields: walking speed, VO2 max, cycling cadence, steps cadence, average and max power output, running speed, and running power
MenstruationFlow, MenstruationPeriod, CervicalMucus, OvulationTest, IntermenstrualBleeding, SexualActivity
Exported fields: menstrual flow, cervical mucus appearance/sensation, ovulation test result, intermenstrual bleeding, sexual activity
Used only when scheduled exports are enabled so Health.md can read yesterday’s Health Connect data in the background and write it to your selected local export folder
Used only for large manual exports, such as 90 days or all time, so Health.md can read Health Connect data older than the standard 30-day window
All data is stored locally on your device only. Health.md never uploads, syncs, or transmits any health information to external servers.

Health.md reads your health data from Health Connect solely to export it as files to your device. Background access is used only for scheduled exports. All data stays local on your device. No health data is transmitted to any server.
Replace existing files with new health data
Add health data to the end of existing files
Update app-managed sections while preserving your custom content
Balanced format with sections and bullet points
Expanded format with descriptions and context
Export your wellness journey as beautiful, portable markdown files
Works with Obsidian, Notion, and any markdown app
Your data stays on your device — always private
Automated exports keep your notes up to date
Health.md needs permission to read your health data from Health Connect — but only to export it for you.
Read-only access — we never modify your data
All exports happen locally on your device
No cloud, no servers, no tracking
Select where Health.md should save your exported health notes.
If you use Obsidian, select your vault folder
Or choose any folder — Documents, Downloads, wherever works for you
Health.md is ready to export your wellness data.
Tap Export to create your first health notes
Set up automatic exports in the Schedule tab
Customize your export format in Settings
Scheduled exports require the lifetime unlock. Open the paywall to unlock unlimited exports and scheduling.
Manual exports include 3 free runs. Automatic scheduled exports are included with the one-time lifetime unlock.
Unlock Health.md to enable scheduled exports.
Each scheduled run exports the last %1$d complete day(s), ending yesterday, plus any pending failed dates.
This removes all local export history entries. Exported files are not deleted.
Rename fields, add YAML values, and choose which metrics appear.
Free to start, unlock when ready
You get %1$d free manual exports. Unlock once for unlimited exports, scheduled automation, and future premium workflows.
You’re unlocked — enjoy unlimited exports and scheduling.
3 free manual exports, then unlimited with unlock
Scheduling is included with the lifetime unlock
Still local-first: no cloud servers or tracking
